properties.name: app.principal.email
properties.description: Email address of the school principal, used for notifications and attendance filtering.

properties.name: app.principal.google-user-id
properties.description: Google User ID of the principal, used to exclude them from the guest list in meeting attendance.

properties.name: app.notifications.enabled
properties.description: Whether automated email notifications are enabled.

properties.name: app.attendance.end-buffer-minutes
properties.description: Minutes after a class ends before attendance is finalized.

properties.name: app.meet.mock
properties.description: Use the mock Meet client instead of the real Google Meet API.

properties.name: app.meet.mock.active-names
properties.description: Comma-separated list of display names treated as active participants in mock mode.

properties.name: google.calendar.id
properties.description: Google Calendar ID to sync events from.

properties.name: google.client-secret.path
properties.description: Path to the OAuth client secret JSON file.

properties.name: google.tokens.dir
properties.description: Directory where OAuth tokens are stored.
